commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Skill detail tab state, local-auth publish lifecycle Playwright helpers/tests, and `.gitignore` to reduce the generated Skill Card publish e2e flake.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR body gives a concrete `bun run test:pw:publish-lifecycle` failure path with repeated pre-fix Crabbox failures, and current main source shows how `#skill-card` can be reset before the generated tab exists.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; this PR has no actionable finding and only needs normal CI and maintainer merge review.

target.title: fix: stabilize local-auth publish lifecycle e2e
target.body:
## Summary
- stabilize the local-auth publish lifecycle e2e by using the admin publisher persona and waiting for the generated Skill Card API artifact
- preserve `#skill-card` tab intent when the generated card tab appears after an initial render
- ignore local Crabbox capture bundles

## RCA
- the owner dev persona can briefly resolve to a non-publishable or stale owner option during local-auth setup
- after switching to the admin publisher, the remaining flake was the UI losing `#skill-card` when `hasSkillCard` temporarily made the tab invalid, leaving the page on `SKILL.md` even after the card endpoint was ready

## Tests
- `bun run format:check -- src/components/SkillDetailPage.tsx src/__tests__/skill-detail-page.test.tsx e2e/local-auth/helpers.ts e2e/local-auth/publish-skill-lifecycle.pw.test.ts`
- `bunx vitest run src/__tests__/skill-detail-page.test.tsx --pool=threads`
- `bunx vitest run src/__tests__/skill-detail-page.test.tsx`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- Crabbox pre-fix: 5 valid `bun run test:pw:publish-lifecycle` failures on Blacksmith Testbox reproduced the flake
- Crabbox post-fix: 5 valid `bun run test:pw:publish-lifecycle` passes on Blacksmith Testbox
  - `tbx_01ksgtnf8vdttw35k9ktwg0kcx`
  - `tbx_01ksgtnfbp8jzzfz3w4qaz7axt`
  - `tbx_01ksgtnax4bz6d3vvg4fys4rbd`
  - `tbx_01ksgtne53gvd599jk47b0nskx`
  - `tbx_01ksgtwmnqc2e0qrkjc4nsepqc`
- Local `bun run test:pw:publish-lifecycle` was not run because an existing local Convex process was already bound to `127.0.0.1:3210`; Crabbox covered isolated local-auth execution.

## Review
- `$autoreview` clean after the `.crabbox/` ignore fix
target.author: patrick-erichsen
